titleStmt.title: SII 34.130: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 130. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman, 6th year, Makara, Tuesday, Ārdrā = c. 10th Century.
A gift of tax-free land, by a local Brāhmaṇa, for feeding some Brāhmaṇas versed in the Vēdas in the chattiram on the hill.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kOvirājakEcari paṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu 6 Āvatu teṉkarai brahmadeyam peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyOm Ivvāṇṭu makaranāyaṟṟu cevvāy kiḻamai
peṟṟa tiruvātiraināṉṟu pakal Ivvūrt tirucittira kūṭattēy dharmmi ceytu peruṅkuṟi paṇippaṇiyāl paṇittu Ivyavasdhai ceyta paricāvatu Ivvūr valavūr
māppāṉi kāri nakkaṉ tiruveṟumpiyūrāḷvār tirumalaimēl cattirattil prāhma[ ṇar vēdam vallār] Uṇṇa vaitta paricāvatu Arici Irunāḻiyum kāykkaṟi Oṉṟum puḻukkukkaṟi Oṉ
ṟum puḷiṅkaṟi Oṉṟum ney Araippiṭiyum tayir Uriyum pākku Iraṇṭum veṟṟilai Eṭṭum Ipparicu candrātittavaṟ Uṇṇa vaiytta nilamāvatu Ivvūr pu ṟavāy
śrīkaṇṭavāykkālukku mēṟkku mūṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟup palāṟṟukku vaṭakku Aiñcām pāṭakam Iruṅkaṇṭi ṉ Uḷḷiṭṭa dvādaśakkam Aṟumāvil teṟkaṭaiya Orumā vaṭa
kaṭaiya kāṟcceyum candrādittavaṟ Iṟaiyiliyāka Ivaṉiṭaiyē Emmilicainta Iṟai dravyam koṇṭu candrādittavaṟ Iṟaikāṭṭappeṟātōmākavum Iṉnilamiṟai
kāṭṭappaṇittāṉaiyum Iṟaikāṭṭiṉāṉaiyum kāṭṭappaṇitta sabhaiyiliruntāṉaiyum vevvēṟṟu vakai tāmēṇṭuntaṉai kaḷattil tāmēṇṭu kōvi
ṉukku tāmēṇṭuntaṉai poṉ panmāheśvarare maṉṟi Iṟuppikka ppeṟuvārākavum piṉṉaiyum Iṉṉilamiṟai kāṭṭappeṟātōmā kavum paṇippaṇiyāl
paṇittu vyavasthai ceytu kuṭuttōm peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm tiruppēr pālāciriyaṉ Iḷaiyanārāyaṇaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ paṇiyāl I vyavasthai
Eḻutinēṉ Ivvūr madhyasthan dharmmapriyaṉ kalivicaiyaṉ taruṇēntu cēkaraṉēṉ Eḻuttu Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.130 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
